Name: Human Development Index
Description: Composite index measuring average achievement in key dimensions of human development

Name: Population Growth Rate
Description: The annual rate of population growth

Name: Total Fertility Rate (National)
Description: Average number of children a woman would have during her reproductive lifetime

Name: Total Fertility Rate (by County)
Description: County-specific total fertility rates

Name: Contraceptive Prevalence Rate (CPR)
Description: Percentage of women using any method of contraception

Name: Modern Contraceptive Prevalence Rate (mCPR)
Description: Percentage of women using modern contraceptive methods

Name: Unmet Need for Family Planning
Description: Percentage of women with unmet need for family planning

Name: Prevalence of Child Marriages (National)
Description: Percentage of women married before age 18

Name: Prevalence of Child Marriages (by County)
Description: County-specific child marriage prevalence

Name: Prevalence of FGM (National)
Description: Percentage of women who have undergone FGM

Name: Prevalence of FGM (by County)
Description: County-specific FGM prevalence

Name: Adolescent Pregnancies (National)
Description: Percentage of adolescent girls who have given birth

Name: Adolescent Pregnancies (by County)
Description: County-specific adolescent pregnancy rates

Name: Life Expectancy at Birth
Description: Average number of years a newborn is expected to live

Name: Maternal Mortality Ratio
Description: Number of maternal deaths per 100000 live births

Name: Neonatal Mortality Rate
Description: Number of neonatal deaths per 1000 live births

Name: Infant Mortality Rate
Description: Number of infant deaths per 1000 live births

Name: Child Mortality Rate
Description: Number of child deaths per 1000 live births

Name: Adult Mortality Rate
Description: Adult mortality rate per 1000 population

Name: Migration Rate
Description: Rate of population migration

Name: Net Migration Flow (Rural to Urban)
Description: Net number of people moving from rural to urban areas

Name: Migration Database in Place
Description: Whether a functional migration database exists

Name: No. of Reviewed & Implemented Policies on Urbanization & Migration
Description: Number of policies reviewed and implemented

Name: Disaster & Climate Change Mortality Rate
Description: Mortality rate related to disasters and climate change

Name: Disaster & Climate Change Morbidities
Description: Morbidity cases related to disasters and climate change

Name: No. of Population Programmes Integrating PHED Approaches
Description: Number of programmes integrating PHED approaches

Name: Mortality Rates Related to Natural Disasters & Climate Change
Description: Mortality rates from natural disasters and climate change

Name: No. of Casualties Related to Natural Disasters & Climate Change
Description: Number of casualties from natural disasters and climate change

Name: No. of Development Plans Integrating Population Issues
Description: Number of development plans integrating population issues
